Hero.title: I am Wilmer Soto, <y>developer</y> and <y>systems engineer</y>.
Hero.subtitle: I am Wilmer Soto Vidal, a Systems Engineering graduate from the Universidad de Antioquia with experience as a Front-end Developer, creating modern interfaces with Next.js and Tailwind CSS. I am proficient in languages such as Python, JavaScript/TypeScript, Java, HTML, and CSS, and my skills also extend to the backend with Spring Boot, PostgreSQL, Docker, and tools like Git, GitHub Actions, and Postman.
